# ---
title: "classroom_analysis"
output: html_document
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source(file.path("analysis", "dataload.R"))
source(file.path("analysis", "analysis_helpers.R"))

```

```{r}
cr <- load_classroom_conditions(outputs_dir = "final_outputs")
classroom_df <- cr$conditions
classroom_sweep_dir <- cr$sweep_dir

print_basic_checks(classroom_df, keys = c("k_ts", "k_st", "k_ss"))

classroom_df %>% summarise(across(c(r_mean, ts_plv_mean, ss_plv_mean, teacher_dom_mean), ~sum(is.na(.x))))


```

```{r}
# --- classroom printed summaries (per k_ss) ---
classroom_summaries <- classroom_df %>%
  group_by(k_ss) %>%
  summarise(
    max_teacher_dom = teacher_dom_mean[which.max(teacher_dom_mean)][1],
    max_teacher_dom_kts = k_ts[which.max(teacher_dom_mean)][1],
    max_teacher_dom_kst = k_st[which.max(teacher_dom_mean)][1],

    max_ts_plv = ts_plv_mean[which.max(ts_plv_mean)][1],
    max_ts_plv_kts = k_ts[which.max(ts_plv_mean)][1],
    max_ts_plv_kst = k_st[which.max(ts_plv_mean)][1],

    .groups = "drop"
  )

classroom_summaries

```

```{r}
classroom_df %>%
  arrange(desc(teacher_dom_mean)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10) %>%
  select(k_ts, k_st, k_ss, teacher_dom_mean, ts_plv_mean, ss_plv_mean, r_mean) %>%
  kable(digits = 3, caption = "Top 10 classroom conditions by teacher dominance (tail-mean)")
```

```{r}
# Heatmaps per k_ss
p_tsplv <- ggplot(classroom_df, aes(x = k_ts, y = k_st, fill = ts_plv_mean)) +
  geom_tile() +
  facet_wrap(~k_ss) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C", na.value = "grey90") +
  labs(
    title = "Classroom: teacherâ€“student PLV (mean over last fraction)",
    x = "k_ts (teacherâ†’student)", y = "k_st (studentâ†’teacher)", fill = "ts_plv_mean"
  ) +
  theme_thesis()

p_dom <- ggplot(classroom_df, aes(x = k_ts, y = k_st, fill = teacher_dom_mean)) +
  geom_tile() +
  facet_wrap(~k_ss) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C", na.value = "grey90") +
  labs(
    title = "Classroom: teacher dominance (ts PLV âˆ’ ss PLV)",
    x = "k_ts (teacherâ†’student)", y = "k_st (studentâ†’teacher)", fill = "teacher_dom_mean"
  ) +
  theme_thesis()

p_r <- ggplot(classroom_df, aes(x = k_ts, y = k_st, fill = r_mean)) +
  geom_tile() +
  facet_wrap(~k_ss) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C", na.value = "grey90") +
  labs(
    title = "Classroom: global coherence R (mean over last fraction)",
    x = "k_ts (teacherâ†’student)", y = "k_st (studentâ†’teacher)", fill = "r_mean"
  ) +
  theme_thesis()

p_tsplv
p_dom
p_r
```

```{r}

save_fig(p_tsplv, "classroom_faceted_ts_plv_mean.png", classroom_sweep_dir, width = 9, height = 5)
save_fig(p_dom,   "classroom_faceted_teacher_dom_mean.png", classroom_sweep_dir, width = 9, height = 5)
save_fig(p_r,     "classroom_faceted_r_mean.png", classroom_sweep_dir, width = 9, height = 5)

```
